# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  MAX_TITLE_LENGTH: "100"
  MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH: "500"
  ALLOWED_CHARS_PATTERN: "^[a-zA-Z0-9 ._-]+$"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

.sanitize_input: &sanitize_input
  - |
    sanitize_text() {
      local input="$1"
      local max_length="$2"
      local sanitized
      
      # Remove control characters and null bytes
      sanitized=$(echo "$input" | tr -d '\000-\037\177')
      
      # Truncate to max length
      sanitized="${sanitized:0:$max_length}"
      
      # Escape special characters for shell safety
      sanitized=$(echo "$sanitized" | sed 's/[`$\\!]/\\&/g')
      
      echo "$sanitized"
    }

.validate_mr_data: &validate_mr_data
  - |
    validate_mr_input() {
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not running in merge request context"
        return 1
      fi
      
      # Validate MR title exists and is not empty
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Merge request title is empty"
        return 1
      fi
      
      # Check title length
      local title_length=${#CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}
      if [ $title_length -gt 200 ]; then
        echo "ERROR: MR title exceeds maximum length"
        return 1
      fi
      
      # Sanitize and store MR data
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(sanitize_text "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" "$MAX_TITLE_LENGTH")
      export SAFE_MR_DESC=$(sanitize_text "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-No description}" "$MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH")
      export SAFE_MR_IID="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
      
      # Create safe tag name (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)
      export SAFE_TAG_NAME=$(echo "$SAFE_MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//' | cut -c1-50)
      
      echo "Validated MR data:"
      echo "  Title: $SAFE_MR_TITLE"
      echo "  IID: $SAFE_MR_IID"
      echo "  Tag: $SAFE_TAG_NAME"
      
      return 0
    }

validate_merge_request:
  stage: validate
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  script:
    - *sanitize_input
    - *validate_mr_data
    - validate_mr_input
    - |
      # Store validated data in artifacts for downstream jobs
      mkdir -p .ci-data
      echo "$SAFE_MR_TITLE" > .ci-data/mr_title
      echo "$SAFE_MR_DESC" > .ci-data/mr_description
      echo "$SAFE_MR_IID" > .ci-data/mr_iid
      echo "$SAFE_TAG_NAME" > .ci-data/tag_name
      echo "$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" > .ci-data/commit_sha
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - .ci-data/
    expire_in: 1 hour

build_application:
  stage: build
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  dependencies:
    - validate_merge_request
  script:
    - *sanitize_input
    - |
      # Load validated data from artifacts
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(cat .ci-data/mr_title)
      export SAFE_MR_IID=$(cat .ci-data/mr_iid)
      export COMMIT_SHA=$(cat .ci-data/commit_sha)
      
      echo "Building application for MR !$SAFE_MR_IID"
      echo "Feature: $SAFE_MR_TITLE"
      
      # Build application (example)
      mkdir -p build
      echo "Build for MR !$SAFE_MR_IID - $SAFE_MR_TITLE" > build/build_info.txt
      echo "Commit: $COMMIT_SHA" >> build/build_info.txt
      echo "Build Time: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> build/build_info.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - .ci-data/
    expire_in: 1 day

run_tests:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - |
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(cat .ci-data/mr_title)
      echo "Running tests for: $SAFE_MR_TITLE"
      # Run tests here
      echo "Tests passed"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - .ci-data/
    expire_in: 1 day

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  dependencies:
    - run_tests
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - *sanitize_input
    - |
      # Load validated data
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(cat .ci-data/mr_title)
      export SAFE_MR_IID=$(cat .ci-data/mr_iid)
      export SAFE_TAG_NAME=$(cat .ci-data/tag_name)
      export COMMIT_SHA=$(cat .ci-data/commit_sha)
      
      # Create deployment tag with sanitized MR title
      DEPLOY_TAG="staging-mr${SAFE_MR_IID}-${SAFE_TAG_NAME}-${COMMIT_SHA}"
      
      # Validate tag format (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)
      if ! echo "$DEPLOY_TAG" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$'; then
        echo "ERROR: Invalid tag format after sanitization"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      echo "Deploying with tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
      
      # Store deployment info securely
      mkdir -p deployment
      cat > deployment/deployment_info.json <<EOF
{
  "merge_request_iid": "$SAFE_MR_IID",
  "feature_title": "$SAFE_MR_TITLE",
  "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOY_TAG",
  "commit_sha": "$COMMIT_SHA",
  "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
  "environment": "staging",
  "pipeline_id": "$CI_PIPELINE_ID"
}
EOF
      
      # Simulate deployment
      echo "Deployed to staging environment"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment/
      - .ci-data/
    expire_in: 7 days

generate_release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  dependencies:
    - deploy_staging
  script:
    - |
      # Load validated data
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(cat .ci-data/mr_title)
      export SAFE_MR_DESC=$(cat .ci-data/mr_description)
      export SAFE_MR_IID=$(cat .ci-data/mr_iid)
      export COMMIT_SHA=$(cat .ci-data/commit_sha)
      
      # Generate release notes
      mkdir -p release-notes
      cat > release-notes/RELEASE_NOTES.md <<EOF
# Release Notes

## Merge Request !${SAFE_MR_IID}

**Feature:** ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}

**Description:**
${SAFE_MR_DESC}

**Commit:** ${COMMIT_SHA}

**Deployed:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d\ %H:%M:%S\ UTC)

**Pipeline:** ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}

---
EOF
      
      echo "Release notes generated successfully"
      cat release-notes/RELEASE_NOTES.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release-notes/
    expire_in: 30 days

notify_build_status:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  dependencies:
    - deploy_staging
  script:
    - |
      # Load validated data
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(cat .ci-data/mr_title)
      export SAFE_MR_IID=$(cat .ci-data/mr_iid)
      export DEPLOY_TAG=$(cat deployment/deployment_info.json | grep deployment_tag | cut -d'"' -f4)
      
      # Prepare notification payload with validated data
      NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
{
  "merge_request": "!${SAFE_MR_IID}",
  "title": "${SAFE_MR_TITLE}",
  "status": "deployed",
  "environment": "staging",
  "tag": "${DEPLOY_TAG}",
  "pipeline_url": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
}
EOF
)
      
      echo "Notification payload prepared:"
      echo "$NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD"
      
      # Send notification using secure API call
      # Using curl with proper headers and HTTPS only
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        # Validate webhook URL is HTTPS
        if echo "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL" | grep -qE '^https://'; then
          curl -X POST \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "User-Agent: GitLab-CI/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" \
            --max-time 10 \
            --retry 3 \
            --fail \
            -d "$NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD" \
            "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL" || echo "Notification failed (non-critical)"
        else
          echo "ERROR: Webhook URL must use HTTPS"
        fi
      else
        echo "No webhook configured, skipping notification"
      fi
  allow_failure: true

create_deployment_commit:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  dependencies:
    - generate_release_notes
  script:
    - |
      # Load validated data
      export SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(cat .ci-data/mr_title)
      export SAFE_MR_IID=$(cat .ci-data/mr_iid)
      
      # Configure git with CI credentials (using GitLab CI tokens)
      git config user.email "gitlab-ci@example.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      
      # Create deployment record with sanitized MR info
      mkdir -p deployments
      cp deployment/deployment_info.json "deployments/deployment-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.json"
      
      git add deployments/
      
      # Create commit message with validated MR data
      COMMIT_MSG="Deploy: MR !${SAFE_MR_IID} - ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}

Automated deployment from merge request !${SAFE_MR_IID}
Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      
      git commit -m "$COMMIT_MSG" || echo "No changes to commit"
      
      # Push using CI token (secure, scoped access)
      # git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" HEAD:${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}
      
      echo "Deployment record created"
  allow_failure: true
